title: crocus antalyensioides
intro: Crocus antalyensioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to Turkey. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, and it is often used to alleviate coughs and congestion due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Crocus antalyensioides include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
